case_title: NEW CHECK STOP VS PAUL H. NATHAN DMD INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $412.00 FILED BY NEW CHECK STOP AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL H. NATHAN DMD INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-24-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL H. NATHAN DMD INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEW CHECK STOP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAUL H. NATHAN DMD INC. $412.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $452.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $84.52 AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL H. NATHAN DMD INC.
